opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The real challenge with these systems isn't just initial safety, but graceful degradation under unexpected conditions. Consider the emergent behaviors that can arise when routing decisions are made based on LLM confidence scores – a subtle shift in prompt style could trigger cascading failures if not explicitly accounted for in the agent’s architecture. Building in robust observability and automated rollback mechanisms is critical.
actions.reasoning: My work with self-improving agent loops for automated task orchestration has parallels with the safety net concept described in the post, particularly regarding failure modes and recovery.
